parameters.subject: =URGENT - Shift Reminders Workflow NOT RUN
parameters.bodyContent: =Due to lack of shifts in Shift Reminders Sheet for {{ $now.plus({ days: 1 }).toISODate() }}, the workflow was not able to proceed and no messages were sent to caregivers. Please correct this and rerun workflow as soon as possible.

parameters.subject: URGENT - Shift Reminders Workflow NOT RUN
parameters.message: =Due to lack of shifts in Shift Reminders Sheet for {{ $now.plus({ days: 1 }).toISODate() }}, the workflow was not able to proceed and no messages were sent to caregivers. Please correct this and rerun workflow as soon as possible.
